sourcePrompt: A Vietnamese rural farmhouse, a single-story family home about eight meters wide - a step up from a hut. Plastered timber-framed walls in a warm earth tone, a clay-tile roof with gentle pitch, a covered veranda across the front on wooden posts sheltering the central doorway, and shuttered windows either side. Earthy plaster, dark timber and terracotta tile, settled and lived-in.
handEdit: back slope extended 2.56->3.30 on its 33deg plane: eave now drapes to y=2.10 with 0.77m overhang (was hiked at 2.50 with 0.15m), matching the front; ribs follow
